title: kaempferia kamthornii
intro: Kaempferia kamthornii, also known as 'Paku Pak', is a type of rhizome plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Kaempferia kamthornii include relief from pain, reduction of fever, and improvement of blood circulation. In traditional Thai medicine, the rhizome is often prepared as a tea or dried powder for its medicinal purposes, and it has also been used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures.
